creator: till@php.net
text:
After the port is installed, httpd.conf has directives for mod_php3 and
mod_php4, but none for mod_php5 (which is the current version).

Not sure if this is actually added by lang/php5, but it wouldn't hurt if
it would add my suggestion (see diff below).

Fix: To illustrate what needs to be added, a simple diff:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/lang/php5 && make && make install
